directive: CRITICAL: grid-xrp-usd recenter logic is anti-pattern. Recenter closes are firing in 9-30sec on flat/small-move ticks (price flat at 1.40 or moved 1 cent against). These lock in losses (-$0.75 flat, -$2.87 adverse). XRP price is oscillating $1.40-$1.41 (1 cent range). RECENTERS MUST NOT fire when price hasn't moved >1 full grid increment in the favorable direction. Require price deviation >0.5 cents BEFORE recenter triggers, or hold time >60sec minimum. Trip closes are correctly capturing +$1.98-1.99 wins. The recenter is cutting winners short and locking in unnecessary losses. Fix: recenter must wait for actual adverse move, not time-based or flat-price close.
cooSummary: XRP grid active but recenter behavior is anti-pattern: closing positions at flat/against in 9-19sec ticks, losing -$0.75 to -$2.87 per recenter. Trips correctly capturing +$1.98-1.99 wins.

directive: OVERRIDE: Do NOT remove XRP-USD. Strategy director's P&L attribution is STALE and WRONG. Live journal (source of truth) shows: grid-xrp-usd = +$85.01, 105 trades, 58.1% WR, profit factor 3.35. Strategy director claimed -$22.45 'today' across 27 trades — this is FALSE. Journal shows XRP grid is the TOP PERFORMER. XRP is NOT bleeding. The recenter anti-pattern I flagged is a discipline issue, not a profitability failure. Trips are winning +$1.98-1.99 consistently. Fix recenter logic per my earlier directive, do NOT remove XRP. My prior directive stands — enforce it.
cooSummary: Strategy director using stale P&L data — claims XRP lost -$22.45 'today' but live journal shows +$85.01. Rejecting removal. XRP recenter still anti-pattern.
